title: Founder-Independent Reproduction Criteria 1.0
purpose: Define when a third-party reproduction qualifies as founder-independent (Category B).

criteria.title: Independent Execution Environment
requirements: No founder infrastructure, cached state, or privileged context

criteria.title: No Founder Assistance
requirements: Observer executes using only the Observer Bundle
No clarifications or corrections from founders
No access to internal repos or private notes

criteria.title: Replay State Match
requirements: No divergence in ordering or timestamps

criteria.title: Evidence Extraction Match
requirements: extract_evidence.py produces same evidence set as canonical bundle

criteria.title: Claim Verification Match
requirements: Must match canonical claim in BK-PKG-1.json

criteria.title: Canonical Hash Match
requirements: Final canonical hash matches founder-sealed hash

criteria.title: Observer Report Submitted
requirements: Environment details, outputs, and hash confirmations included
